subcodes.first_line: The Book, revealed by the Lord of the worlds in His Most Great Prison, wherein He heraldeth unto the nations that which hath dawned and shone forth from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مولی العالم فی سجنه الاعظم و یبشر فیه الامم بما اشرق و لاح من افق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
